use_cases: Full-screen hero background for landing pages
Animated visual showcase on portfolio or creative sites
Standalone generative art component for interactive installations
Loading or transition screen visual effect
ai_summary: A WebGL raymarching shader that renders an abstract rotating 3D visual effect with colorful cosine-based coloring. Uses time-driven animation and vector math to create pulsing geometric patterns with a rotating axis. Self-contained component with full-screen canvas rendering and no user interactions beyond continuous animation.
